name: Slark
description: If I'd known I'd end up here, I'd have stayed in Dark Reef Prison.

abilities.name: Essence Shift
abilities.description: Each successful attack grants Slark bonus.

abilities.name: Dark Pact
abilities.description: After a short delay, Slark dispels most negative debuffs while dealing damage to enemy units around him and to himself. The damage on self is less effective.

abilities.name: Pounce
abilities.description: Increases leap distance, and replaces its cooldown with a charge restore time. Does not affect units. Since the ability has no max leash distance, the ability reapplies the debuff when the enemy unit is no longer debuff immune regardless of distance.

abilities.name: Saltwater Shiv
abilities.description: A successful attack now steals a portion of the target's health restoration, health regeneration, and movement speed for Slark.

abilities.name: Depth Shroud
abilities.description: Creates a dark cloud at the area-targeted location. All allied units within the radius are affected by Shadow Dance of its corresponding level.

abilities.name: Shadow Dance
abilities.description: Grants all allied units under Shadow Dance attack speed bonus. This ability has a fixed downtime and does not grant its bonuses when Slark is damaged by neutral creeps. Depth Shroud bonuses and attack speed bonus are not affected.
